title: polypodium biforme
intro: Polypodium biforme, also known as two-form polypody, is a species of fern native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its unique two-form growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. Polypodium biforme can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
